name: Road Safety Data – North Yorkshire (STATS19, 2009–2013)
description: Road traffic accident records for the North Yorkshire Police force area, England, 2009–2013, derived from the UK STATS19 data collection system. The dataset covers 8 358 accidents with attributes including severity, road conditions, weather, geographic coordinates, junction details, and linked census geography (output area, LSOA, local authority district). Re-published in a 19-table Third Normal Form relational schema on the TU Wien DBRepo test instance; five ML-ready views are exposed via REST API.

creator.name: North Yorkshire Police / UK Department for Transport

publisher.name: North Yorkshire County Council (Open Data Hub) via European Data Portal

distribution.name: ml_accident_features (DBRepo REST API)
distribution.description: Full de-normalised feature table exposed as a DBRepo view. Fetch via GET /api/v1/database/{db_id}/view/{view_id}/data with Accept: application/json and HTTP Basic Auth. Paginate with query params page (0-based) and size.

ml:recordSet.name: ml_accident_features
ml:recordSet.description: Full de-normalised feature table for ML training. One row per accident. Contains all coded attribute columns from the accident fact table plus rural/urban flag, output area size, and local authority district name resolved from the geographic hierarchy.

ml:field.name: police_ref
ml:field.description: Unique accident reference number assigned by the reporting police force.

ml:field.name: accident_date
ml:field.description: Calendar date on which the accident occurred (ISO 8601).

ml:field.name: accident_time
ml:field.description: Time of day at which the accident occurred (ISO 8601 time).

ml:field.name: day_of_week
ml:field.description: Day of the week encoded as an integer (1 = Sunday … 7 = Saturday, STATS19 coding).

ml:field.name: easting
ml:field.description: Easting coordinate in the British National Grid (OSGB36), in metres.

ml:field.name: northing
ml:field.description: Northing coordinate in the British National Grid (OSGB36), in metres.

ml:field.name: longitude
ml:field.description: WGS84 longitude of the accident location, in decimal degrees.

ml:field.name: latitude
ml:field.description: WGS84 latitude of the accident location, in decimal degrees.

ml:field.name: severity_id
ml:field.description: Accident severity: 1 = Fatal, 2 = Serious, 3 = Slight. FK → severity_type.

ml:field.name: road_cond_id
ml:field.description: Road surface condition at time of accident. FK → road_surface_condition.

ml:field.name: light_condition_id
ml:field.description: Lighting conditions at time of accident. FK → light_condition.

ml:field.name: weather_condition_id
ml:field.description: Weather conditions at time of accident. FK → weather_condition.

ml:field.name: special_condition_id
ml:field.description: Special conditions at site (e.g. road works). FK → special_condition_at_site.

ml:field.name: carriageway_hazard_id
ml:field.description: Carriageway hazard present (e.g. vehicle in road). FK → carriageway_hazard.

ml:field.name: road_type_id
ml:field.description: Road type (e.g. single carriageway, dual carriageway, roundabout). FK → road_type.

ml:field.name: speed_limit_mph
ml:field.description: Posted speed limit on the road at the accident location, in miles per hour.

ml:field.name: junction_detail_id
ml:field.description: Junction detail (e.g. not at junction, roundabout, T-junction). FK → junction_detail.

ml:field.name: junction_control_id
ml:field.description: Junction control type (e.g. give way, traffic signals). FK → junction_control.

ml:field.name: crossing_control_id
ml:field.description: Pedestrian crossing control type. FK → pedestrian_crossing_control.

ml:field.name: crossing_facility_id
ml:field.description: Pedestrian crossing facility type. FK → pedestrian_crossing_facility.

ml:field.name: casualties
ml:field.description: Total number of casualties in the accident (count).

ml:field.name: vehicles
ml:field.description: Total number of vehicles involved in the accident (count).

ml:field.name: rural_urban
ml:field.description: Rural or urban classification of the output area. Values: 'Rural', 'Urban'.

ml:field.name: area_hectares
ml:field.description: Area of the output area in hectares.

ml:field.name: lad_name
ml:field.description: Name of the local authority district (LAD) in which the accident occurred.
